title: CUB Banking Evolved
subtitle: Reimagining CUB's mobile experience for India's digital-first users.
problem_statement: CUB's current app offers basic banking, lacking proactive financial guidance and engaging zero-to-one features.

pillars.title: Financial Clarity
pillars.insight: Users seek clear, actionable insights into their spending and savings.

pillars.title: Digital Trust
pillars.insight: Security and reliability are paramount for online banking transactions.

pillars.title: Effortless Control
pillars.insight: Users desire quick, seamless management of their funds and bills.

artifacts.label: Strategy
artifacts.title: Defining the Challenges
questions: How might we make CUB banking more intuitive?
How might users manage finances proactively?
How might we integrate personalized financial insights?

data.name: HDFC Bank
cons: App can feel cluttered, less personalized.

data.name: ICICI Bank
pros: Strong digital features, wide service range.

points.name: ICICI Bank
points.desc: Feature-rich, but UI can be overwhelming.

points.name: Paytm Bank
points.desc: High ease of use for payments, less banking.

personas.name: Rohan Sharma
personas.quote: I need banking that understands my digital lifestyle.
personas.bio: Tech-savvy professional seeking efficient, smart financial management on the go.

personas.name: Priya Singh
personas.quote: I want to simplify my bill payments and savings.
personas.bio: Manages household finances, seeks easy bill payments and savings tracking.

insights: "Can I pay all my bills easily?"
"Is this banking app secure and fast?"

points.action: Replace static 'Daily Expense' with dynamic spending insights.
points.benefit: Empowers users with actionable financial intelligence.

points.action: Integrate financial literacy modules with personalized transaction history.
points.benefit: Educates users while they manage their money.

points.action: Incorporate gamified savings challenges from fitness apps.
points.benefit: Boosts engagement and encourages financial discipline.

points.action: Enhance 'Instant Fund Transfer' with QR code and UPI integration.
points.benefit: Streamlines payments, aligning with Indian market trends.

pivot.before: CUB's app is a transactional tool, reactive to user commands.
pivot.pivot_logic: Shift from a reactive tool to a proactive, intelligent financial wellness companion.
pivot.after: CUB becomes a trusted advisor, guiding users towards financial goals.

annotations.title: Smart Insights
annotations.rationale: Provide personalized spending analysis beyond 'Daily Expense'.

annotations.title: UPI Integration
annotations.rationale: Enable seamless, instant payments via India's preferred method.

annotations.title: Financial Coach
annotations.rationale: Offer proactive advice and goal tracking within the app.

data.finding: A+ for font size is good, but more customization needed.
